title: 2025-08-19 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 9.17
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2025-08-19: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 9.17/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-08-19, the score printed 9.17/100 in the low regime, with volatility and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work.
